Alternative fixes (e.g., regex-based parsing, different loop structure, separate if-elif blocks) would all pass as long as they produce the correct behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests check that freethreaded platform strings produce 'freethreaded' in build_options, Variant.FREETHREADED variant, and matching triples. A stub returning None, empty list, or default values would fail these assertions (e.g., 'assert result is not None', 'assert "freethreaded" in result.build_options').
